name: how-to-live-or-a-life-of-montaigne-in-one-question-and-twenty-attempts-at-an-answer
description: Sarah Bakewell's 'How to Live: Or A Life of Montaigne in One Question and Twenty Attempts at an Answer' — the definitive modern biography of Montaigne. 20 answers to the question of how to live: don't worry about death, question everything, be convivial, be ordinary and imperfect. Blending biography, philosophy, and wisdom.
